recent_news.title: Lumai Productizes Lens-Based Optical Computer
recent_news.summary: New systems are for evaluation, with commercial systems coming by 2029. The post Lumai Productizes Lens-Based Optical Computer appeared first on EE Times.
recent_news.body_text:
British startup Lumai is productizing its lens-based optical computer for matrix-multiply acceleration in AI inference. This is the first time an optical computing system has successfully run billion-parameter models and goes a long way towards demonstrating the technology’s commercial viability, Phil Burr, head of product at Lumai, told EE Times.

general_news.title: AMD is reportedly developing an entry-level RDNA 4 GPU with 8GB of VRAM — RX 9050 rumored to debut with 2048 cores, more than RX 9060
general_news.summary: AMD is allegedly planning to launch an RX 9050 SKU to compete with the RTX 5050, featuring more cores than the OEM-exclusive RX 9060.
